tooltip.simplybows.bow.vine.ability: Fires an arrow that cultivates a flower field that heals allies and harms enemies.
tooltip.simplybows.bow.ice.ability: Fires a fan of homing frost arrows.
tooltip.simplybows.bow.bubble.ability: Fires arrows unaffected by water drag, and create short-lived bubble columns.
tooltip.simplybows.bow.blossom.ability: Fires arrows that create small blossom storms.
tooltip.simplybows.bow.earth.ability: Fires arrows that cause earth tremors.
tooltip.simplybows.bow.echo.ability: Summons two magical bows that fire at nearby targets and mimic your own arrow shots.
tooltip.simplybows.bow.vine.frame_effect: ◦ Increases flower field healing and damage.
tooltip.simplybows.bow.earth.frame_effec: ◦ Increases spike damage and upward launch.
tooltip.simplybows.bow.echo.string_effec: ◦ Faster magic bow fire, shorter targeting range.
tooltip.simplybows.bow.echo.frame_effect: ◦ Slower magic bow fire, longer targeting range.
tooltip.simplybows.bow.ice.string_effect: ◦ Fires additional homing arrows per volley.
tooltip.simplybows.bow.generic.rune.pain: ✦ Alters the behavior of a unique bow ability.
tooltip.simplybows.bow.generic.rune.grac: ✦ Alters the behavior of a unique bow ability.
tooltip.simplybows.bow.generic.rune.boun: ✦ Alters the behavior of a unique bow ability.
tooltip.simplybows.bow.vine.rune.pain: ✦ Field no longer heals, and now damages more frequently.
tooltip.simplybows.bow.vine.rune.grace: ✦ Field no longer damages enemies. Now grows a cherry blossom that cleanses negative effects.
tooltip.simplybows.bow.vine.rune.bounty: ✦ Enemies dying in the flower field can now drop bonus loot.
tooltip.simplybows.bow.earth.rune.pain: ✦ Damaging spikes erupt outward from the center.
tooltip.simplybows.bow.ice.rune.pain: ✦ Arrows focus on a single target and deal more damage.
tooltip.simplybows.bow.ice.rune.grace: ✦ Arrows apply stacking slowness on hit.
tooltip.simplybows.bow.ice.rune.bounty: ✦ Fires additional arrows, but arrows deal less damage.
tooltip.simplybows.bow.echo.rune.bounty: One of the magical bows will now mirror your off-hand bow.
tooltip.simplybows.upgrade_component.enc: Applies +1 Enchanted String to a unique bow.
tooltip.simplybows.upgrade_component.rei: Applies +1 Reinforced Frame to a unique bow.
tooltip.simplybows.upgrade_component.run: Applies Pain Rune Etching to a unique bow.
Applies Grace Rune Etching to a unique bow.
Applies Bounty Rune Etching to a unique bow.
Applies a rune etching to a unique bow.
tooltip.simplybows.upgrade_component.cap: Total upgrade slots available per bow: %1$s.
message.simplybows.upgrade.cap_reached: Bow upgrade cap reached (%1$s per type, %2$s total).
